title: Smoky Noodle Curry
description: A spicy Indian-inspired noodle dish featuring smoky flavors and springy texture.

ingredients.name: springy noodles
ingredients.notes: preferably rice noodles or egg noodles

ingredients.name: smoky garam masala
ingredients.notes: make sure it's smoky and not regular

ingredients.name: matcha powder
ingredients.notes: optional, adds a hint of green tea flavor

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, cook until softened (3-4 minutes).
Add garam masala, mustard, and matcha powder. Cook for 1 minute.
Add noodles, chicken broth, and yogurt. Stir well.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 8-10 minutes.
Stir occasionally to prevent noodles from sticking.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions (optional).
